base_boundaries: No live data: receipt evidence is limited to checked-in local fixtures and does not fetch market, news, or broker data.
No broker integration: rerun commands do not place, route, recommend, or simulate trades with a broker.
No prediction: artifacts summarize supplied catalyst records and do not forecast prices, returns, or outcomes.
No investment advice: artifacts are deterministic public research examples, not personalized recommendations.
current_boundaries: No live data: receipt evidence is limited to checked-in local fixtures and does not fetch market, news, or broker data.
No broker integration: rerun commands do not place, route, recommend, or simulate trades with a broker.
No prediction: artifacts summarize supplied catalyst records and do not forecast prices, returns, or outcomes.
No investment advice: artifacts are deterministic public research examples, not personalized recommendations.

limitations: Static receipt comparison only: inputs are existing local JSON receipts and no market, news, or broker data is fetched.
Non-advisory evidence: output reports artifact drift and does not recommend trades, positions, or investment actions.
Hash-based artifact drift: changed entries are based on receipt metadata such as schema labels, bytes, hashes, and rerun commands.

examples/impact_brief.json.name: impact_brief.json
examples/impact_brief.json.rerun_command: python -m market_catalyst_calendar impact-brief --input examples/demo_records.json --as-of 2026-05-13 --days 45 --format json > examples/impact_brief.json

examples/impact_compare.json.name: impact_compare.json
examples/impact_compare.json.rerun_command: python -m market_catalyst_calendar impact-compare --base examples/demo_records.json --current examples/demo_records_updated.json --as-of 2026-05-27 > examples/impact_compare.json

examples/impact_compare.md.name: impact_compare.md
examples/impact_compare.md.rerun_command: python -m market_catalyst_calendar impact-compare --base examples/demo_records.json --current examples/demo_records_updated.json --as-of 2026-05-27 --format markdown > examples/impact_compare.md

examples/impact_dashboard.json.name: impact_dashboard.json
examples/impact_dashboard.json.rerun_command: python -m market_catalyst_calendar impact-dashboard --input examples/demo_records.json --as-of 2026-05-13 --days 45 --format json > examples/impact_dashboard.json
